data.title: Miramar Resources Issues 894 Million Unquoted Options to Bolster Capital Flexibility
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Miramar Resources Limited ( (AU:M2R) ) is now available.

Miramar Resources Limited has issued 894 million unquoted options exercisable at $0.004 and expiring on March 13, 2028, as notified in an Appendix 3G to the ASX. The large tranche of unlisted options, previously foreshadowed in an Appendix 3B, represents a significant potential source of future equity and may influence the company’s capital structure and dilution profile for existing shareholders.

The options are not quoted and are not intended to be quoted on the ASX, indicating their use is likely tied to specific financing or incentive arrangements rather than immediate trading liquidity. This move underscores Miramar Resources’ ongoing efforts to secure long-term funding flexibility as it advances its resource exploration and development activities.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:M2R) stock is a Sell with a A$0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Miramar Resources Limited stock, see the AU:M2R Stock Forecast page.

More about Miramar Resources Limited

Miramar Resources Limited is an Australian-listed exploration company focused on mineral resource development. The company’s activities center on identifying and advancing resource projects, positioning it within the broader mining and resources sector.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$6.04M

data.title: Fat Prophets Global Contrarian Fund hit by Middle East turmoil but adds to Asian tech bets
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Fat Prophets Global Contrarian Fund Ltd. ( (AU:FPC) ) has provided an announcement.

Fat Prophets Global Contrarian Fund reported an estimated pre-tax net tangible asset value of $1.9869 per share as at 11 March 2026, down from $2.1916 on 28 February, representing a 9.34% decline. The manager attributed the drawdown to the market turmoil sparked by the Middle East conflict, which has weighed on its core positions in precious metals, Japanese financials, and Chinese technology, though the fund’s shares remain cum a 2 cent special dividend.

Management expects the conflict to keep markets unsettled in the near term but anticipates a relatively swift resolution and a subsequent rebound, drawing parallels with last year’s tariff-related sell-off and recovery. Despite sector-wide multiple compression and investor concerns over AI disruption, the fund notes relative resilience in U.S. technology stocks and has selectively increased exposure to major China and Asian tech names such as Tencent, Baidu, Alibaba, Tencent Music, GDS Holdings and Grab, signalling confidence that technology valuations may be near a bottom.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:FPC) stock is a Buy with a A$2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Fat Prophets Global Contrarian Fund Ltd. stock, see the AU:FPC Stock Forecast page.

More about Fat Prophets Global Contrarian Fund Ltd.

Fat Prophets Global Contrarian Fund Limited is an Australia-listed investment company trading on the ASX under the code FPC. The fund follows a contrarian global equity strategy, with core thematic exposures in precious metals, Japanese financials and banks, and Chinese and broader Asian technology stocks, aiming to capitalise on cyclical and policy-driven market dislocations.

Average Trading Volume: 29,477

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

See more data about FPC stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Janison moves to reassure after unrelated glitches hit NAPLAN and CA ANZ exams
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Janison Education Group Ltd. ( (AU:JAN) ) has provided an announcement.

Janison Education Group has responded to recent media coverage after two separate technology interruptions disrupted some digital assessment sessions for NAPLAN Online and Chartered Accountants Australia and New Zealand candidates. The company expressed regret for the impact on students, teachers, schools, families, and candidates, and said it is working with program partners to review the incidents as part of its continuous improvement efforts.

The NAPLAN disruption on 11 March 2026 halted a portion of morning sessions but was resolved within about two hours, allowing testing to resume the same day and continue without further issues. A separate issue affected CA ANZ exams, where some candidates faced interruptions and are being offered rescheduled sessions, with Janison stressing that these are the first major problems in five years of running CA ANZ exams and that the two affected platforms are distinct, reinforcing its broader record of reliable large-scale delivery.

The company highlighted that it delivers more than 7 million digital assessments annually in complex, multi-partner environments where occasional issues can arise despite extensive testing. It reaffirmed its commitment to reliable digital assessment delivery, established contingency arrangements for disrupted tests, and close collaboration with partners, seeking to reassure stakeholders about the robustness of its systems and its focus on safeguarding the integrity of key education programs.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:JAN) stock is a Hold with a A$0.21 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Janison Education Group Ltd. stock, see the AU:JAN Stock Forecast page.

More about Janison Education Group Ltd.

Janison Education Group is an Australian-owned education technology company that provides online assessment solutions to governments, education systems, professional bodies, and corporations worldwide. Its platforms power large-scale, high-stakes programs such as NAPLAN Online, enabling millions of digital assessments each year with a focus on reliability, accessibility, and fair testing at scale.

Average Trading Volume: 54,408

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$38.98M

For a thorough assessment of JAN stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: 3P Learning Director Katherine Ostin Increases Indirect Shareholding via On-Market Purchase
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

3P Learning Ltd. ( (AU:3PL) ) has shared an update.

3P Learning has disclosed a change in director Katherine Ostin’s indirect holdings in the company, lodged in accordance with ASX listing rules on director interests. The notice details that Ostin’s interest is held via Nitso Pty Ltd as trustee for the Ostin-Shortus Family Trust, where she is both a director of the corporate trustee and a beneficiary.

On 12 March 2026, Ostin acquired 22,988 fully paid ordinary shares in 3P Learning through an on-market trade at $0.435 per share, increasing her indirect holding from 11,111 to 34,099 shares. The company confirmed there was no trading during a closed period requiring prior written clearance, indicating the transaction complied with relevant governance and disclosure obligations for directors’ dealings.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:3PL) stock is a Hold with a A$0.46 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on 3P Learning Ltd. stock, see the AU:3PL Stock Forecast page.

More about 3P Learning Ltd.

3P Learning Limited is an education technology company focused on digital learning solutions. The company provides online educational programs, including mathematics and literacy platforms, targeting school-aged students and educational institutions. Its products are delivered as fully paid digital services, positioning it within the broader edtech and online learning market.

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Macbee Planet Inc ( (JP:7095) ) has issued an update.

Macbee Planet, Inc. outlined its corporate progress alongside third-quarter fiscal 2026 results, emphasizing its evolution from a 2015 start-up to a Prime market-listed holding company. Management highlighted an aggressive M&A strategy, including the acquisitions of Alpha, All Ads, PR Cloud Tech, and MOJA, designed to strengthen its marketing solutions portfolio and broaden its competitive position in performance-based advertising.

The shift to a holding company structure with MA VEL as the operating arm is intended to support integration of these subsidiaries and enhance operational efficiency. By moving up to the Prime section and consolidating specialized marketing firms under its umbrella, Macbee Planet is positioning itself for larger-scale growth opportunities and deeper penetration of Japan’s digital marketing and performance advertising markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:7095) stock is a Buy with a Yen1657.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Macbee Planet Inc stock, see the JP:7095 Stock Forecast page.

More about Macbee Planet Inc

Macbee Planet, Inc. is a Japan-based provider of performance-based fee marketing services, focusing on data-driven customer acquisition and optimization for clients. Founded in 2015 and headquartered in Tokyo’s Shibuya district, the company has scaled rapidly, growing to 182 employees and securing a listing on the Tokyo Stock Exchange’s Prime market in 2024.

data.title: LEEF Brands Secures US$4.5 Million to Expand Flagship Cannabis Farm and Adds Industry Veteran to Board
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Leef Brands ( (TSE:LEEF) ) has provided an update.

LEEF Brands has secured an initial US$4.5 million tranche of up to US$8 million in non-brokered private placement financing led by Mindset Capital, issuing common and preferred shares to fund the expansion of its Salisbury Canyon Ranch cultivation facility in California. The capital is intended to scale the ranch to its full 180-acre permit, boosting internal low-cost biomass supply to improve margins and product consistency over time, while adding cannabis industry veteran Jamie Mendola to the board to strengthen strategic execution and growth planning.

The financing structure includes units priced at CAD $0.25 with attached warrants and preferred shares carrying a 15% annual dividend, with the company targeting completion of the raise within about 45 days. Expanded production at Salisbury Canyon Ranch is expected to position LEEF as a competitive low-cost producer of clean cannabis inputs, potentially enhancing its role in the cannabis supply chain as regulatory reforms evolve and demand for high-quality concentrates grows.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:LEEF) stock is a Hold with a C$0.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Leef Brands stock, see the TSE:LEEF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:LEEF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:LEEF is a Underperform.

The score is primarily weighed down by very weak financial health—severe losses, negative operating cash flow, and especially negative shareholders’ equity. Technicals add further pressure with a clear downtrend and bearish momentum. Valuation provides limited support because losses make the negative P/E difficult to interpret and there is no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:LEEF stock, click here.

More about Leef Brands

LEEF Brands Inc. is a rapidly growing, multi-state cannabis operator focused on cultivation and concentrate production, with a key presence in California. The company’s flagship asset is Salisbury Canyon Ranch, a large-scale licensed cannabis farm designed to supply biomass for its concentrates and support its expansion into broader U.S. and potentially international markets.
